series_metadata.series_title: Rehabilitation Services Commission (RSC) Weekly Eligibility File Transfer
series_metadata.series_description: The Rehabilitation Services Commission (RSC) Weekly Eligibility File Transfer contains an exchange of data between the RSC and the BWC to verify an individual’s eligibility for funding through the cooperative agreement.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain the RSC Monthly Management File Transfer, on the I: Drive for 15 years in the Rehab Policy folder, and then destroy. The email records are contained on the H: Drive in Word on each of the Disability Management Coordinators at BWC and will be downloaded to a compact disk., Electronic: Delete
